message:
fix(core,parser,layout,render-svg,wasm,cli): harden numeric inputs, fix calendar validation, and ensure deterministic ordering

Numeric robustness across rendering and configuration:
- fm-core/font_metrics: guard FontMetrics::new against zero, negative, or
  non-finite font_size and line_height by clamping to safe defaults (15.0
  and 1.5 respectively), preventing zero-dimension layouts and potential
  division-by-zero in downstream layout and rendering passes.
- fm-render-svg/path, fm-render-svg/transform: both fmt_num helpers now
  return "0" for NaN/Infinity and add a range check before casting f32 to
  i32, avoiding undefined behavior on values outside i32 range.
- fm-wasm: merge_canvas_config now validates font_size (> 0, finite),
  padding (>= 0, finite), node_stroke_width (>= 0, finite), and
  edge_stroke_width (>= 0, finite) before applying overrides, silently
  ignoring bogus values from the JS caller.

Font-metrics-aware layout for render_svg_js:
- fm-wasm: render_svg_js now builds the SvgRenderConfig before layout so it
  can pass svg_config.font_metrics() into LayoutConfig, switching from
  layout_diagram_traced_with_algorithm_and_guardrails to
  layout_diagram_traced_with_config_and_guardrails. This ensures the WASM
  renderSvg path uses the same font-metrics-driven layout as the full
  render() path, fixing width/height discrepancies when custom font sizes
  are configured. Unused import of the old function is removed. A new test
  (render_svg_js_uses_same_font_metrics_layout_path_as_render) verifies
  both paths produce identical SVG output.

Proper calendar date validation in gantt parsing:
- fm-parser/mermaid_parser: normalize_gantt_date_with_format now calls
  is_valid_gantt_calendar_date which checks per-month day limits including
  leap year rules (via is_gantt_leap_year using is_multiple_of), replacing
  the naive 1..=31 range check that accepted dates like Feb 31.
- fm-layout: parse_iso_day_number applies the same per-month validation
  through is_valid_iso_calendar_date / iso_days_in_month / is_iso_leap_year
  (using rem_euclid for correct negative-year handling).
  Both modules add tests for impossible dates (Feb 31, Feb 29 in non-leap
  years) and valid edge cases (Feb 29 in leap years, Apr 30).

Deterministic iteration order:
- fm-parser/mermaid_parser: gantt task_ids_to_nodes and git graph branches
  maps switched from HashMap to BTreeMap, ensuring deterministic iteration
  and therefore reproducible IR output across runs. The now-unused HashMap
  import is removed.
- fm-core/lib: IrLabelSegment derives PartialOrd and Ord, enabling sorted
  collections of label segments where deterministic ordering is needed.

CLI config extraction and font_size propagation fix:
- fm-cli/main: extract duplicated SvgRenderConfig construction into
  build_svg_render_config helper, called by both the SVG and PNG render
  paths. The PNG path previously ignored the font_size flag; it now
  respects it through the shared helper. A new test verifies theme and
  font_size are correctly applied.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
